name: get_hospital_doctors
description: Get doctors for a specific hospital, optionally filtered by department. Use this when you need to find doctors at a hospital. If department_name is provided, returns doctors in that specialty only. If department_name is omitted, returns top 5 doctors across all departments sorted by rating. Returns doctor details including doctorId, doctorName, rating, specialization, hospitalName, and hospitalId.

hospital_id.description: The unique identifier for the hospital (e.g., 'hospital_apollo_hospitals_jubilee_hills_500033'). This is the hospitalId you received from other functions.

department_name.description: Optional: Full department name with 'Department of' prefix. If provided, filters doctors to this specialty only. If omitted, returns top doctors across all departments. Examples: 'Department of Cardiology', 'Department of Orthopedics', 'Department of Neurology', 'Department of Oncology', 'Department of Gastroenterology'.
